name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle skills. Hosts rabbit-spec-create (drafts initial spec bodies via the read-only rabbit-spec-creator subagent) and rabbit-spec-update (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.15.0 -> 1.16.0, #875): script-backed-orchestration cleanup (child of #863). Added Inv 9 requiring zero check-script-backed.py findings and documenting the <!-- example --> exemption marker for the illustrative dispatch-spec-create.py CLI synopsis in rabbit-spec-create Step 1. Marked that fenced bash block as an example; new E2E guard test-script-backed-clean.py asserts scan reports count: 0. No invariant renumbered; numbering stays contiguous 1..9.
